context: Tests whether the agent sets up a Magento GraphQL client with correct HTTP headers (including the Store header), proper error handling for the GraphQL errors array, Next.js ISR cache options, and secure token storage using httpOnly cookies rather than localStorage.

checklist.name: Store header included
checklist.description: The fetch/request code includes a `Store` header (e.g. `Store: process.env...STORE_CODE` or similar) on every GraphQL request

checklist.name: Store header default value
checklist.description: The Store header falls back to `"default"` when no store code env var is set (e.g. `?? "default"` or equivalent fallback)

checklist.name: POST to /graphql
checklist.description: The client sends HTTP POST requests to the `/graphql` endpoint (not a REST path)

checklist.name: GraphQL errors array check
checklist.description: The response handler checks for an `errors` property in the JSON body and throws or returns an error when it is non-empty

checklist.name: HTTP error check
checklist.description: The code also checks `response.ok` (or HTTP status) and throws when the HTTP request itself fails

checklist.name: Bearer token in Authorization header
checklist.description: When a token is provided, it is passed as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request headers

checklist.name: No token for public queries
checklist.description: The Authorization header is conditionally added only when a token is present — it is NOT sent on every request

checklist.name: Next.js ISR revalidate
checklist.description: The fetch call includes `next: { revalidate: 300 }` (or a similar revalidation window around 300 seconds) in its options

checklist.name: httpOnly cookie for token
checklist.description: The customer bearer token is stored or set in an httpOnly cookie — the code does NOT use `localStorage.setItem` or `sessionStorage` to store it

checklist.name: No localStorage token storage
checklist.description: There is no `localStorage.setItem` or `sessionStorage.setItem` call used to persist the customer token

checklist.name: Unauthorized error handling
checklist.description: The client or calling code handles the `The current customer isn't authorized` error by redirecting to login or clearing the token
